articles.title: Mum rescued from Venezuela rubble with newborn baby tells BBC how he helped her survive
articles.description: The "miracle" rescue of 18-day-old baby Juan David is a symbol of hope in Venezuela after the devastating earthquakes.

articles.title: The Good Life actress Dame Penelope Keith dies aged 86
articles.description: Tributes are paid to the "comic genius", who starred in some of Britain's most popular sitcoms.

articles.title: One in 10 children in England referred for mental healthcare - with anxiety the main reason
articles.description: Demand is soaring beyond capacity, meaning children in England wait years for help with various conditions.

articles.title: Temperatures to drop this week but relief from heat may be short-lived
articles.description: Many will experience cooler air and some rain this week before a possible return to hot weather at the weekend.
